why_not_independent_authority_evidence: Semantic-family IDs were assigned 1:1 with surface forms; paraphrases were treated as independent observations.
Corpus was agent-authored/template-expanded, not dual-curated blind labels with inter-annotator adjudication.
The coding agent that participated in classifier remediation cannot be sole gold-label authority.
Natural deidentified conversational seller language is a small minority of source mix.
Context-fixture coverage (23) is insufficient for context-contract validation at authority grade.
Statistical lower bounds for precision ≥ 0.99 and recall ≥ 0.95 cannot be supported by paraphrase-inflated independence.
Production routing intents (e.g. sold → wrong_number) were used as if they were pure semantic gold.
Leakage audit did not include character n-gram / lineage / translation-equivalent depth sufficient for blind claims.
